name: SuperAlloy Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: SuperAlloy Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in engineering and manufacturing lightweight metal products primarily for the automotive industry. It provides forged aluminum wheels for luxury and sports automobiles; and engineering lightweight suspension components. The company has operations in Taiwan, the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, other parts of Europe, Australia, Japan, and internationally. SuperAlloy Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Douliu City, Taiwan.
